# IBM Verify

Derived tables in the `ibm_verify` schema, populated from the IBM Verify
reporting API.

- [`app_login_counts`](app_login_counts.qmd) - daily sign-in counts by application
- [`auth_total_logins`](auth_total_logins.qmd) - daily, CanadaLogin-wide sign-in totals
- [`mfa_activity`](mfa_activity.qmd) - multi-factor authentication activity by factor and result

The upstream source-of-record for these tables is the raw IBM Verify event
stream (`ibm_verify_raw.ibm_verify`). The field-level meaning of those raw
events is documented in the IBM Verify event data dictionary
(`IBM Verify Data Dictionary.csv`), organized by event type (Authentication
Event, MFA Authentication Event, SSO, and so on).
